w:r.w:t: Substitute a Purple or Yellow Cell
And/or reverse the directions of whole or parts
If you can say it, you can play it
If you can’t hear it, you’re not likely to play it.
E.g. back-up harmonies (use a harmonious sequence)
(use a groove, hot lick, or beat-box strategy)
